steps.title: Calculate the monthly return amount
steps.content:
The company sold 1,600,000 units in the first month with a 12% return rate. Find how many units are returned each month:
$$\text{Monthly returns} = 0.12 \times 1,600,000 = 192,000$$

steps.title: Multiply by 5 months
steps.content:
Since both sales volume and return rate remain the same, the total returns over the 5-month period (the first month plus the next 4 months) is:
$$\text{Total returns} = 192,000 \times 5 = 960,000$$
That confirms C is correct.
